summary: Replaced Eldritch Guardian block-placeholder renderer with a TC4 RenderEldritchGuardian-inspired renderer.
Added Guardian/Warden/Golem ModelLayerLocation and LayerDefinition anchors for 1.19.2 ModelPart migration.
Added TC4 GenCommon numeric palette adapter and GenPortal 16x16x13 room bridge.
Portal encounter now places the GenPortal bridge before boss/key-room bridge placement.
Added NEXT_CHAT_PROMPT_STAGE219.md for continuation in another chat.
known_remaining_work: Renderer classes still draw cuboid bridge geometry; Stage220 should consume baked ModelParts directly.
Full ModelEldritchGuardian and ModelEldritchGolem trees are not yet completely copied.
GenCommon decoration queues for urns, crystals, crab spawners need dedicated runtime entities/blocks.
Gen2x2, GenPassage, GenLibraryRoom, GenNestRoom remain partial/next-stage work.

gradle_build.reason: Gradle wrapper needs gradle-7.5.1-bin.zip from services.gradle.org
